content.text: Vertical 9:16 text-forward viral reel motion design sequence: opening 0.5 seconds — screen is 100% {{accent_color}} solid fill, then a single bold centered headline '{{hook_line_1}}' slams in with a 2-frame scale-from-120% snap, immediately followed at frame 18 with '{{hook_line_2}}' sliding in from the right at 400px/s, at second 1.5 the background transitions to B-roll video footage ({{b_roll_description}}) via opacity morph while text remains fully opaque over it using multiply blend mode, at second 2.5 a progress bar appears bottom-center incrementing to 100% over 4 seconds with a tick mark animation — this anchors viewer to stay, at second 3 a third text reveal appears: '{{payoff_text}}' in smaller 24pt subtext below hero, at second 5 CTA button animates: '{{cta_text}}' in a pill button with pulsing ring glow, total 6 second duration, pacing calibrated for 100% retention to the 3-second mark based on platform algorithm data.
content.negativePrompt: slow text animations, serif fonts, multiple font weights in same sequence, background music reference without permission, text that bleeds off safe zone, excessive color changes

promptToCopy: Vertical 9:16 text-forward viral reel motion design sequence: opening 0.5 seconds — screen is 100% {{accent_color}} solid fill, then a single bold centered headline '{{hook_line_1}}' slams in with a 2-frame scale-from-120% snap, immediately followed at frame 18 with '{{hook_line_2}}' sliding in from the right at 400px/s, at second 1.5 the background transitions to B-roll video footage ({{b_roll_description}}) via opacity morph while text remains fully opaque over it using multiply blend mode, at second 2.5 a progress bar appears bottom-center incrementing to 100% over 4 seconds with a tick mark animation — this anchors viewer to stay, at second 3 a third text reveal appears: '{{payoff_text}}' in smaller 24pt subtext below hero, at second 5 CTA button animates: '{{cta_text}}' in a pill button with pulsing ring glow, total 6 second duration, pacing calibrated for 100% retention to the 3-second mark based on platform algorithm data.

_db.longDescription: The progress bar + text slam combo is the current highest-retention pattern across TikTok and Instagram Reels. This prompt is built on platform algorithm psychology, not visual aesthetics alone.

title: Cinematic Before/After Split Reveal — Transformation Viral Prompt
description: Maximum-engagement transformation reveal prompt using precision-engineered split-screen wipe timing, psychological tension architecture, and dopamine-timed reveal mechanics.

content.text: 9:16 viral transformation video using a vertical split-screen reveal mechanic: left half of screen shows {{before_state}} in desaturated muted color grade (-60% saturation, +20% grain), right half shows {{after_state}} in full cinematic color with +15% vibrance and clean lighting — a sharp vertical dividing line splits the frame exactly at center-x, initially 100% of screen shows the BEFORE state (line at right edge, off-screen), over 3 seconds the line sweeps from right to left at accelerating speed (ease-in curve) revealing the AFTER state incrementally, at 50% reveal the line pauses for exactly 0.4 seconds — creating maximum psychological tension — then resumes sweep to full left edge completing the reveal, immediately after full reveal a bold centered text badge scales in with spring animation: '{{transformation_label}}' in 48pt heavy sans-serif with a dark semi-transparent pill background, below that: a social proof line '{{stats_line}}' in 14pt, 2-second hold on completed reveal, fade to black at second 6. Music cue placeholder: tension build → impact hit at reveal completion.

Music cue placeholder: tension build → impact hit at reveal completion.

_db.longDescription: The before/after split wipe is the highest-converting format in fitness, interior design, and product transformation content. The 0.4-second pause at 50% reveal is a patented psychological tension technique that forces the brain to complete the reveal.

content.text: Abstract 3D fluid simulation video: a continuous 20-second perfectly looping animation of {{primary_metal_color}} liquid mercury-like fluid mass in constant slow morphic transformation — no static moments at any frame, surface exhibits perfect mirror reflectivity with environment map reflections of a pure black void space (only reflections visible, no environment shown), fluid mass transitions between distinct sculptural archetypes across the loop: sphere → toroid → möbius ribbon → branching dendritic form → collapsed sphere restart — each transition spans 4-5 seconds, transition boundaries are imperceptible (morphological continuity maintained), surface normals produce shifting specular highlights as form rotates at 6 RPM constant spin, subsurface scattering creates dark amber glow from interior on backlit passages, 4K render at 60fps for silky motion quality, no background — pure black void, no motion blur (crisp frame precision), loop junction at 20 seconds must be mathematically seamless, ambient orchestral undertone audio placeholder.
content.negativePrompt: static portions, visible loop seam, matte non-reflective surface, color bleeding into void, water behavior (bubbles/foam), organic biological appearance, inconsistent reflections

promptToCopy: Abstract 3D fluid simulation video: a continuous 20-second perfectly looping animation of {{primary_metal_color}} liquid mercury-like fluid mass in constant slow morphic transformation — no static moments at any frame, surface exhibits perfect mirror reflectivity with environment map reflections of a pure black void space (only reflections visible, no environment shown), fluid mass transitions between distinct sculptural archetypes across the loop: sphere → toroid → möbius ribbon → branching dendritic form → collapsed sphere restart — each transition spans 4-5 seconds, transition boundaries are imperceptible (morphological continuity maintained), surface normals produce shifting specular highlights as form rotates at 6 RPM constant spin, subsurface scattering creates dark amber glow from interior on backlit passages, 4K render at 60fps for silky motion quality, no background — pure black void, no motion blur (crisp frame precision), loop junction at 20 seconds must be mathematically seamless, ambient orchestral undertone audio placeholder.

_db.longDescription: Liquid metal abstract loops are the fastest-selling category on NFT platforms and art installation rental marketplaces. The möbius ribbon transition is the most visually sophisticated morphic form in generative art.

variables.name: primary_metal_color
variables.description: Primary metal tone for the liquid form
variables.default: chrome silver with deep violet subsurface

_db.exampleOutput: 20-second seamless loop of gold liquid metal morphing through sphere/toroid/möbius/dendritic sequence, 4K 60fps, void background.
